title: Joulegram Idempotent Request Metadata
description: Headers and metadata that make mutating requests safe to retry.

idempotency_key.description: Client-generated key unique per logical request.

request_hash.description: Digest of normalized request body used for replay detection.

created_at.description: UTC timestamp when key was first seen by the server.

expires_at.description: UTC timestamp when idempotency record expires.

replayed.description: True when the response is served from a prior completed request.

original_status.description: Status code from the original request for replayed responses.
